title: U.S. and Mexican Officials Deny C.I.A. Had Lethal Role in Mexico Operation
summary_full: The denials came after a CNN report claimed the C.I.A. had been involved in the assassination of a cartel member inside Mexico earlier this year.
summary_public: The denials came after a CNN report claimed the C.I.A. had been involved in the assassination of a cartel member inside Mexico earlier this year.
